---
id: register-webhook
title: "Register a webhook for a PIX key"
description: "Associates a webhook URL with a PIX key the PSP holds for the merchant. After registration, every received PIX addressed to this key triggers an HTTPS `POST` to the URL with the payment payload. The endpoint must respond `2xx` within 5 seconds; otherwise the rail retries with exponential backoff for up to 24 hours."
sidebar_label: "Register a webhook for a PIX key"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: docs/api/pix-api/instant-payments-api-pix-sample
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Register a webhook for a PIX key"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/webhook/{chave}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Associates a webhook URL with a PIX key the PSP holds for the merchant. After registration, every received PIX addressed to this key triggers an HTTPS `POST` to the URL with the payment payload. The endpoint must respond `2xx` within 5 seconds; otherwise the rail retries with exponential backoff for up to 24 hours.

A key supports one webhook at a time. Calling this endpoint a second time replaces the previous registration.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"chave","in":"path","required":true,"description":"The PIX key. URL-encoded if it contains special characters (for example, an email key).","schema":{"type":"string","example":"merchant@example.com"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["webhookUrl"],"properties":{"webhookUrl":{"type":"string","format":"uri","description":"HTTPS URL the PSP posts to when a payment settles. Must use TLS 1.2 or higher and a publicly-resolvable certificate."}},"title":"WebhookRegistration"},"example":{"webhookUrl":"https://merchant.example/payments/pix-callback"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"201":{"description":"Webhook registered.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"webhookUrl":{"type":"string","format":"uri"},"chave":{"type":"string"},"criacao":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"}},"title":"Webhook"}}}},"400":{"description":"Request payload failed validation.","content":{"application/problem+json":{"schema":{"type":"object","description":"Error response in `application/problem+json` format (RFC 7807).","required":["type","title","status"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","format":"uri","example":"https://instant-payments.example/errors/charge-already-exists"},"title":{"type":"string","example":"A charge with this txid already exists."},"status":{"type":"integer","example":409},"detail":{"type":"string"},"violacoes":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"razao":{"type":"string"},"propriedade":{"type":"string"}}}}},"title":"Problem"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
